name: hermes-mobile
description: Mobile-first Hermes client bridge over the local Hermes API server.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/service-worker.js
scripts.test: npm run check && python -m py_compile cron_bridge.py directory_bridge.py skill_bridge.py todo_bridge.py && npm run privacy:scan
